# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

# Kubernetes Deployment Manifests for Microservices with Istio Sidecar Injection Control
# All deployments have sidecar injection ENABLED to ensure service mesh security

---
# Namespace with Istio injection enabled at namespace level
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: platform-team
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with mandatory Istio sidecar injection"

---
# Frontend Service Deployment - Sidecar injection explicitly enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    description: "Frontend service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled for mTLS and observability"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      annotations:
        # Explicitly enable sidecar injection - never set to false
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        # Sidecar resource management for production stability
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        # Enable access logging for security auditing
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        # Hold application start until proxy is ready
        proxy.istio.io/config: '{"holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true}'
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: registry.example.com/frontend-service:1.2.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "frontend-service"
            - name: BACKEND_URL
              value: "http://backend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8080"

---
# Backend API Service Deployment - Sidecar injection explicitly enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    description: "Backend API service with Istio sidecar proxy for secure service-to-service communication"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-service
        version: v1
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "750m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "768Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        proxy.istio.io/config: '{"holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true}'
        # Intercept all inbound and outbound traffic through the proxy
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "*"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "*"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: backend
          image: registry.example.com/backend-service:2.1.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "backend-service"
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "database-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-db-credentials
                  key: password

---
# Database Proxy Service Deployment - Sidecar injection explicitly enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    description: "Database proxy service with Istio sidecar for encrypted database connections"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-service
        version: v1
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "1Gi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        proxy.istio.io/config: '{"holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true}'
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "*"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "*"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: db-proxy
          image: registry.example.com/database-proxy:1.0.5
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: tcp-postgres
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 15
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Worker/Background Processing Service - Sidecar injection explicitly enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: worker-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    description: "Background worker service with Istio sidecar for secure message queue access"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker-service
        version: v1
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        proxy.istio.io/config: '{"holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts": true}'
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "*"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "*"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: worker-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: registry.example.com/worker-service:1.3.2
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 15
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "worker-service"
            - name: QUEUE_URL
              value: "amqp://message-queue.microservices.svc.cluster.local:5672"

---
# Service Accounts for each microservice (least privilege)
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: worker-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: worker-service

---
# Kubernetes Services for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-service
  ports:
    - name: tcp-postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: worker-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: worker-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: worker-service
  ports:
    - name: http-metrics
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - Enforce strict mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Enforce strict mTLS for all services - requires sidecar injection"
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - Default deny all traffic in namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny-all policy - explicit allow rules required"
spec: {}

---
# Allow frontend to communicate with backend
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-frontend-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/frontend-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8080"

---
# Allow backend to communicate with database
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/backend-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "5432"

---
# Allow worker to communicate with backend for task results
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-worker-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/worker-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8080"

---
# Istio Sidecar resource to limit egress scope per service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: frontend-sidecar
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: frontend-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./backend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
        - "istio-system/*"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: backend-sidecar
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: backend-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./database-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
        - "istio-system/*"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: worker-sidecar
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: worker-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./backend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
        - "./message-queue.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
        - "istio-system/*"

---
# NetworkPolicy to enforce network-level segmentation alongside Istio
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny all ingress and egress - defense in depth with Istio"
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-istio-system
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Allow traffic from istio-system for sidecar injection and control plane"
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-intra-namespace
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Allow traffic within the microservices namespace (Istio handles fine-grained authz)"
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector: {}
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector: {}
